title: Elif and Else
summary: Explore how to use elif and else for multiple conditions.

sketchBlocks.title: Understanding Elif and Else
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown: In Python, `elif` and `else` are used to handle multiple conditions in control flow. They allow you to execute different blocks of code based on the evaluation of conditions.

quizDraft.title: Using Elif in Python
quizDraft.prompt: Write a function that checks the value of a variable and returns a string based on its value using elif.
quizDraft.hint: Think about how you can chain conditions together.

help.concept: Elif allows you to check multiple conditions sequentially. If the first condition is false, it checks the next one.
help.hint_1: Consider using multiple if statements with elif for different ranges.
help.hint_2: Remember to handle the case when none of the conditions are met.

quizDraft.title: Elif and Else Logic
quizDraft.prompt: Create a function that categorizes a number as positive, negative, or zero using elif and else.
quizDraft.hint: You will need to check if the number is greater than, less than, or equal to zero.

help.concept: Using elif and else helps in categorizing values based on conditions.
help.hint_1: Start by checking if the number is zero first.
help.hint_2: Make sure to cover all possible cases.

quizDraft.title: Complex Elif Statements
quizDraft.prompt: Implement a function that checks the grade based on a score using elif statements.
quizDraft.hint: You will need to define ranges for different grades.

help.concept: Elif statements can be used to define multiple ranges for grading.
help.hint_1: Consider what score corresponds to each grade.
help.hint_2: Make sure to cover all possible score ranges.

quizDraft.title: Understanding Elif Syntax
quizDraft.prompt: Fill in the blank: The keyword used to introduce additional conditions in Python is ___.
quizDraft.template: The keyword used to introduce additional conditions in Python is ___.

quizDraft.title: Elif Usage
quizDraft.prompt: Which of the following is a correct use of elif in Python?
quizDraft.hint: Look for the structure that includes if, elif, and else.

help.concept: Elif must follow an if statement and can be followed by an else statement.
help.hint_2: Remember that elif is used for additional conditions.

options: if x > 10: print('Greater') elif x < 5: print('Smaller')
elif x > 10: print('Greater') if x < 5: print('Smaller')
if x > 10: print('Greater') else: print('Smaller') elif x < 5: print('Smaller')
